use_cases: Display a continuous loading animation while waiting for async operations
Indicate processing state during form submissions
Show progress indicator for data fetching in dashboards
Provide visual feedback during page transitions
Use as a loading state for any UI component awaiting data
ai_summary: A lightweight morphing loading spinner component that displays an animated square continuously morphing its shape between rounded and circular states while rotating. Built with Framer Motion for smooth CSS animations, it supports flexible message placement around the spinner for contextual loading labels.
